input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.3.2
            TITLE: maximum fuel/energy used

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.3.2: Maximum Fuel/Energy Used
D.13.3.2 Maximum Fuel/Energy Used 
Vehicles whose corrected average (IC) fuel consumption / (EV) energy equivalent per lap 
exceeds the values in D.13.4.5 will receive zero points

final_answer: rule D.13.3.2: Maximum Fuel/Energy Used Vehicles whose corrected average (IC) fuel consumption / (EV) energy equivalent per lap exceeds the values in D.13.4.5 will receive zero points
